Operation 'getCompany' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Current description is too vague about what company information is returned. Enhanced description specifies the types of company details available (name, address, contact), clarifies the relationship to drug products, and provides context for when an AI agent should use this operation.

data.current_description: Returns company information associated with drug products.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves company information for drug product manufacturers and distributors. Returns company details such as name, address, and contact information associated with drug products in the DPD. Use this operation to identify companies responsible for specific drug products or to search for all products from a particular company.
data.reasoning: Current description is too vague about what company information is returned. Enhanced description specifies the types of company details available (name, address, contact), clarifies the relationship to drug products, and provides context for when an AI agent should use this operation.

message: Operation 'getDrugProduct' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Current description only mentions two fields (brand name and DIN) but the operation likely returns more comprehensive data. Enhanced description provides a more complete picture of available product information and clarifies this operation's role as the primary entry point for drug product data, improving AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Returns basic product information including brand name and Drug Identification Number.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves comprehensive drug product information from the Drug Product Database. Returns product details including brand name, Drug Identification Number (DIN), active ingredients, dosage form, route of administration, and regulatory status. This is the primary operation for accessing core drug product data in the DPD.
data.reasoning: Current description only mentions two fields (brand name and DIN) but the operation likely returns more comprehensive data. Enhanced description provides a more complete picture of available product information and clarifies this operation's role as the primary entry point for drug product data, improving AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'getPackaging' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Current description is limited to 'package sizes' but packaging information typically includes more details. Enhanced description provides broader context about packaging attributes, clarifies the types of information returned, and explains the practical use case for AI agents.

data.current_description: Returns available package sizes for drug products.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves packaging information for drug products including package sizes, quantities, and packaging materials. Returns details about how drug products are packaged and distributed, such as unit counts, container types, and package configurations. Useful for identifying available package options for a specific drug product.
data.reasoning: Current description is limited to 'package sizes' but packaging information typically includes more details. Enhanced description provides broader context about packaging attributes, clarifies the types of information returned, and explains the practical use case for AI agents.

message: Operation 'getPharmaceuticalStandard' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Current description is vague about what standards are returned. Enhanced description provides concrete examples of pharmaceutical standards (USP, BP), clarifies the significance of this information, and helps AI agents understand when and why to use this operation.

data.current_description: Returns the standard to which a drug product is manufactured and represented.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the pharmaceutical standard(s) to which drug products are manufactured and represented. Returns standards such as USP (United States Pharmacopeia), BP (British Pharmacopoeia), or other recognized pharmaceutical standards. This indicates the quality and manufacturing specifications that the drug product meets.
data.reasoning: Current description is vague about what standards are returned. Enhanced description provides concrete examples of pharmaceutical standards (USP, BP), clarifies the significance of this information, and helps AI agents understand when and why to use this operation.

message: Operation 'getRouteOfAdministration' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Current description is incomplete and uses passive voice. Enhanced description clarifies that this returns multiple possible routes, provides concrete examples, and explains practical use cases for AI agents to determine when this operation is relevant to their task.

data.current_description: Indicates the body part on or through which the product is administered.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the route(s) of administration for drug products. Returns information about how a drug product is administered to patients, such as oral, intravenous, topical, intramuscular, or inhalation routes. Use this operation to identify available administration methods for a specific drug product or to find products administered via a particular route.
data.reasoning: Current description is incomplete and uses passive voice. Enhanced description clarifies that this returns multiple possible routes, provides concrete examples, and explains practical use cases for AI agents to determine when this operation is relevant to their task.

message: Operation 'getSchedule' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary is too generic. Description lacks clarity about what parameters are accepted, what the response contains, and the practical use case. Enhanced version specifies regulatory framework, indicates filtering capabilities, describes return structure, and explains when an AI agent should use this operation.

data.current_description: Returns drug schedules per Food and Drug Regulations and Controlled Drugs and Substances Act.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve drug schedules by regulatory classification
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves drug schedules classified under the Food and Drug Regulations and Controlled Drugs and Substances Act. Supports filtering by schedule code, drug name, and other parameters. Returns a list of Schedule objects containing schedule codes and descriptions. Use this operation to determine regulatory scheduling requirements for specific drug products.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description lacks clarity about what parameters are accepted, what the response contains, and the practical use case. Enhanced version specifies regulatory framework, indicates filtering capabilities, describes return structure, and explains when an AI agent should use this operation.

message: Operation 'getProductStatus' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary lacks specificity about what 'status' means in regulatory context. Description only lists examples without explaining parameters, response structure, or use cases. Enhanced version clarifies the regulatory/market context, indicates filtering capabilities, describes return structure, and provides guidance on when to use this operation for AI agents.

data.current_description: Returns product status (Approved, Marketed, Cancelled, Dormant, etc.).
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve drug product approval and market status
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the current market and regulatory status of drug products, including Approved, Marketed, Cancelled, Dormant, and other status classifications. Supports filtering by product name, status code, and other parameters. Returns a list of ProductStatus objects with status codes and descriptions. Use this operation to determine whether a drug product is currently available on the market or has been discontinued.
data.reasoning: Original summary lacks specificity about what 'status' means in regulatory context. Description only lists examples without explaining parameters, response structure, or use cases. Enhanced version clarifies the regulatory/market context, indicates filtering capabilities, describes return structure, and provides guidance on when to use this operation for AI agents.

message: Operation 'getTherapeuticClass' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary is too vague and doesn't clarify what 'therapeutic class' means. Description is incomplete - it doesn't explain available parameters, response structure, or practical use cases. Enhanced version clarifies the classification basis, indicates filtering capabilities, describes return structure, and explains when an AI agent should use this operation to find therapeutic information.

data.current_description: Returns therapeutic classification assigned by main therapeutic use.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve therapeutic classifications by primary use
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves therapeutic classifications assigned to drug products based on their primary therapeutic use. Supports filtering by therapeutic class code, drug name, and other parameters. Returns a list of TherapeuticClass objects containing class codes, descriptions, and therapeutic use information. Use this operation to identify the therapeutic category or indication for a specific drug product.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too vague and doesn't clarify what 'therapeutic class' means. Description is incomplete - it doesn't explain available parameters, response structure, or practical use cases. Enhanced version clarifies the classification basis, indicates filtering capabilities, describes return structure, and explains when an AI agent should use this operation to find therapeutic information.

message: Operation 'getVeterinarySpecies' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary lacks context about the veterinary domain and purpose. Description is too brief and doesn't explain parameters, response structure, or use cases. Enhanced version clarifies the veterinary context, indicates filtering capabilities, describes return structure, and provides guidance on when an AI agent should use this operation for veterinary product lookups.

data.current_description: Returns animal species types for veterinary products.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve animal species for veterinary drug products
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves animal species classifications for veterinary drug products. Supports filtering by species code, species name, and other parameters. Returns a list of VeterinarySpecies objects containing species codes and descriptions. Use this operation to determine which animal species a veterinary drug product is approved for or to identify all veterinary products applicable to a specific species.
data.reasoning: Original summary lacks context about the veterinary domain and purpose. Description is too brief and doesn't explain parameters, response structure, or use cases. Enhanced version clarifies the veterinary context, indicates filtering capabilities, describes return structure, and provides guidance on when an AI agent should use this operation for veterinary product lookups.
